form.formComment: Resuming after a four-and-a-half months break. Finished off last campaign fifth of 14 at this track December 1 over 1400m, 12 len behind Grand Marrone carrying 55kg at $26.80. On debut sixth of 8 at this track November 11 over 1600m, 16 len behind Edono Matenro with 55kg at $61.90. Marginal chance.

form.formComment: Most recently 8th of 11 at this track on March 24 over 1200m, 7 len behind Bellagio Speed with 56kg at $22.40. Before that 4th of 11 at this track on March 9 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Kimio with 56kg at $290. Can do a lot better than that last run.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months 7th of 11 at this track on March 24 over 1200m, 7 len behind Bellagio Speed with 54kg at $8.30. Previously second-up 6th of 12 at this track on November 13 over 1200m, 7 len behind Noble Odin carrying 54kg at $16.70. Don't underestimate.

form.formComment: Last start 5th of 11 at this track on March 24 over 1200m, 6 len behind Bellagio Speed with 54kg at $108. The run before that ran last of 14 at this track on March 9 over 1400m, 21 len behind Parme Ciel with 54kg at $64.10. Prefer to watch at this stage.

form.formComment: Last start failed to make an impression; 6th of 11 at this track on March 24 over 1200m, 6 len behind Bellagio Speed with 51kg at $99.70. The start before that sat on the pace before fading to run last of 10 at this track on March 9 over 1200m, 21 len behind Will Place carrying 51kg at $121.40. Can turn things around.

form.formComment: At debut, 5th of 14 at this track on March 23 over 1200m, 9 len behind Ahmedabad with 54kg at $24.20. Encouraging signs on debut and is worth following up.

form.formComment: Was well-supported at debut, crossed from a wide gate to lead but couldn't hold on when 4th of 14 at this track on March 23 over 1200m, 7 len behind Ahmedabad with 54kg at $3.20. Plenty to build upon following her debut.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of 11 weeks. Finished off last preparation tenth of 13 at this track January 26 over 1400m, 19 len behind Mew Chan with 55kg at $246.40. When resuming last campaign second last of 11 at this track September 3 over 1200m, 23 len behind Wild Nobukun with 53kg at $91. Major upset if he won.

form.formComment: Having third race start. At debut, eased back early on 5th of 8 at this track on March 9 over 1400m, 18 len behind Edono Star Wood carrying 53kg at $23.70. form.formComment: Was at big odds at debut, sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 11 at this track on March 9 over 1200m, 2.25 len behind Kimio carrying 55kg at $25.90. Capable of taking this out.
